title: Terminal int8 HardSigmoid soak block
hypothesis: Measure a fresh standalone activation block on a unique wrapper path to validate normal submit and first-pass finalization.

direct_comparison.primary_question: Does this fresh standalone Layer 1 activation block submit and finalize cleanly on the normal path?
include: single cheap Nangate45 sweep on a unique canonical wrapper path
exclude: paired L2 follow-on work until first-pass finalization is confirmed
follow_on_broad_sweep: optional broader parameter or seed sweep after clean first-pass finalization

expected_benefit: Prove stable end-to-end L1 control-plane behavior on a fresh proposal line.
risks: May collapse to no-diff if canonical output paths are accidentally reused.

expected_result.reason: Establish fresh canonical evidence and validate first-pass finalization.
